'''''Raider''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. During the Rebel food shortage following the evacuation of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], ''Raider'' participated in a raid on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grain/Legends|grain]] supply depot based in an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]], as a part of [[Operation Grain Snatch]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}
